title: Code Index — mcp-orchestrator
content:
Module: mcp-orchestrator (root)
Language: Kotlin 2.3.20
Platform: JVM 21
Framework: Ktor 3.4.0
DI: Koin 4.1.1
MCP SDK: io.modelcontextprotocol:kotlin-sdk-server 0.12.0
Purpose: MCP Orchestration Server — aggregates multiple upstream MCP servers, provides semantic tool discovery (find_tools) and tool execution routing (execute_tool)
Source files: 74 (44 main + 30 test)
Classes: 124
Functions: 146

Packages:
  - com.orchestrator.mcp: Application entry point (main)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.config: YAML config loading, validation, env var resolution (OrchestratorConfig, ConfigurationManager, ConfigValidator, ExternalConfigScanner, JsonConfigLoader)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.di: Koin DI module (AppModule)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.discovery: Tool discovery — semantic search + keyword fallback (ToolDiscoveryService, KeywordSearchEngine)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.embedding: Text embedding via OpenAI API (EmbeddingService, OpenAiEmbeddingService)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.execution: Tool execution routing to upstream servers (ToolExecutionDispatcher)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.model: Domain models — ErrorCodes, sealed McpOrchestratorException (8 types), ToolDefinition
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.protocol: MCP protocol handling — JSON-RPC parsing, MCP SDK Server creation, tool registration (McpServerFactory, McpToolRegistrar, McpToolSchemas)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.registry: In-memory tool registry + vector DB indexing (ToolRegistry, ToolIndexer)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.transport: Transport abstraction — stdio (McpTransport, StdioTransport)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.upstream: Upstream MCP server management — connect, health check, auto-reconnect (UpstreamServerManager, McpConnection, StdioMcpConnection, HttpMcpConnection, HealthMonitor)
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.util: Retry utilities with exponential backoff
  - com.orchestrator.mcp.vectordb: Vector DB abstraction — Qdrant (remote) + FAISS (local fallback) (VectorDbClient, QdrantVectorDbClient, FaissVectorDbClient)

Architecture patterns:
  - Interface/Impl pattern for all services
  - Koin DI with single module, all singletons
  - Sealed exception hierarchy (McpOrchestratorException)
  - Transport abstraction (stdio/HTTP)
  - Connection abstraction (stdio process / HTTP upstream)
  - Strategy pattern for VectorDB (Qdrant vs FAISS)
  - Semantic → keyword fallback for tool discovery
  - Coroutine-based health monitoring with auto-reconnect
  - MCP SDK integration via McpServerFactory + McpToolRegistrar

Key interfaces and implementations:
  - ConfigurationManager → ConfigurationManagerImpl
  - ToolDiscoveryService → ToolDiscoveryServiceImpl
  - EmbeddingService → OpenAiEmbeddingService
  - ToolExecutionDispatcher → ToolExecutionDispatcherImpl
  - ToolRegistry → ToolRegistryImpl
  - UpstreamServerManager → UpstreamServerManagerImpl
  - McpConnection → StdioMcpConnection, HttpMcpConnection
  - VectorDbClient → QdrantVectorDbClient, FaissVectorDbClient
  - McpTransport → StdioTransport

Config structure (application.yml):
  - orchestrator.server: port (8080), transport (stdio)
  - orchestrator.discovery: top_k, similarity_threshold, max_query_length, fallback_to_keyword
  - orchestrator.execution: timeout_seconds, validate_arguments, max_retries
  - orchestrator.embedding: provider (openai), model, api_key, dimensions (768)
  - orchestrator.vector_db: provider (qdrant), host, port, collection_name
  - orchestrator.health: check_interval_seconds, auto_reconnect, max_reconnect_attempts
  - orchestrator.upstream_servers: array of {name, transport, command, args, url}

External dependencies (runtime):
  - Qdrant vector database (for semantic tool search)
  - OpenAI API (for text embeddings)
  - Upstream MCP servers (configured in YAML)

Test structure:
  - Unit tests: Kotest + MockK (16 files)
  - Integration tests: Kotest + Ktor TestHost (7 files in .it package)
  - E2E API tests: Kotest + Ktor TestHost (5 files in .e2e package)
  - IntegrationTestBase provides reusable stacks: DiscoveryStack, ExecutionStack, ProtocolStack, IndexerStack

Build commands:
  - ./gradlew build (build + test)
  - ./gradlew test (tests only)
  - ./gradlew buildFatJar (fat JAR: mcp-orchestrator-all.jar)
  - java -jar build/libs/mcp-orchestrator-all.jar (run stdio)
  - java -jar build/libs/mcp-orchestrator-all.jar --config /path/to/config.yml (external config)
tags: code-index, mcp-orchestrator, kotlin, ktor, mcp, jvm
